message.content:
{
  "competency_groups": [
    {
      "code": "C1",
      "title": "Relations and Functions",
      "description": "Understanding types of relations, equivalence relations, one-to-one and onto functions.",
      "competencies": [
        "Identify reflexive, symmetric, transitive and equivalence relations",
        "Determine if a function is one to one or onto"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-I: Relations and Functions",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C2",
      "title": "Inverse Trigonometric Functions",
      "description": "Understanding definition, range, domain, principal value branches, and graphs of inverse trigonometric functions.",
      "competencies": [
        "Define inverse trigonometric functions with their domains and ranges",
        "Identify principal value branches for sin^-1 x, cos^-1 x, tan^-1 x",
        "Sketch graphs of inverse trigonometric functions"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-I: Relations and Functions",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C3",
      "title": "Matrices",
      "description": "Understanding concepts, operations, properties of matrices including non-commutativity and invertibility.",
      "competencies": [
        "Identify types of matrices (zero, identity, symmetric, skew-symmetric)",
        "Perform matrix addition, multiplication, and scalar multiplication",
        "Demonstrate non-commutativity of matrix multiplication for order 2 square matrices",
        "Find the inverse of a square matrix if it exists"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-II: Algebra",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C4",
      "title": "Determinants and Applications",
      "description": "Understanding determinants, minors, co-factors, adjoint, inverse, and solving systems of linear equations.",
      "competencies": [
        "Calculate determinant of a square matrix up to 3x3 order",
        "Find area of a triangle using determinants",
        "Determine consistency or inconsistency of a system of linear equations",
        "Solve systems of linear equations in two or three variables using inverse matrices"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-II: Algebra",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C5",
      "title": "Continuity and Differentiability",
      "description": "Understanding continuity, differentiability, chain rule, derivatives of composite/inverse trigonometric/implicit functions.",
      "competencies": [
        "Test for continuity and differentiability of a function at a point",
        "Apply chain rule to differentiate composite functions",
        "Differentiate inverse trigonometric functions (sin^-1 x, cos^-1 x, tan^-1 x)",
        "Find derivatives of implicit functions"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-III: Calculus",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C6",
      "title": "Exponential and Logarithmic Functions Derivatives",
      "description": "Understanding derivatives of exponential, logarithmic functions, logarithmic differentiation, parametric forms.",
      "competencies": [
        "Differentiate exponential and logarithmic functions",
        "Apply logarithmic differentiation techniques",
        "Find derivatives of functions expressed in parametric forms"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-III: Calculus",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C7",
      "title": "Second Order Derivatives and Applications",
      "description": "Understanding second order derivatives, rate of change, increasing/decreasing functions, maxima/minima.",
      "competencies": [
        "Calculate second order derivatives",
        "Determine the rate of change of quantities",
        "Identify intervals where a function is increasing or decreasing",
        "Apply first and second derivative tests to find local maxima and minima"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-III: Calculus",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C8",
      "title": "Integration Techniques",
      "description": "Understanding integration as inverse of differentiation, substitution, partial fractions, and parts.",
      "competencies": [
        "Evaluate integrals using the method of substitution",
        "Decompose rational functions into partial fractions for integration",
        "Apply integration by parts to evaluate complex integrals"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-III: Calculus",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C9",
      "title": "Definite Integrals and Fundamental Theorem",
      "description": "Understanding definite integrals, their properties, evaluation of specific types, and the Fundamental Theorem.",
      "competencies": [
        "Evaluate standard forms like dx/(x^2+a^2), dx/sqrt(x^2-a^2), etc.",
        "Apply basic properties of definite integrals",
        "State and apply the Fundamental Theorem of Calculus"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-III: Calculus",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C10",
      "title": "Area Under Curves",
      "description": "Understanding applications of integrals to find area under simple curves.",
      "competencies": [
        "Calculate the area under lines, circles, parabolas, and ellipses in standard form"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-III: Calculus",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C11",
      "title": "Differential Equations",
      "description": "Understanding definition, order, degree, solutions, and methods of solving differential equations.",
      "competencies": [
        "Identify the order and degree of a differential equation",
        "Find general and particular solutions",
        "Solve first-order homogeneous differential equations by separation of variables"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-III: Calculus",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C12",
      "title": "Linear Differential Equations",
      "description": "Understanding and solving linear differential equations of specific forms.",
      "competencies": [
        "Solve linear differential equations of the form dy/dx + py = q"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-III: Calculus",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C13",
      "title": "Vectors and Scalars",
      "description": "Understanding vectors, scalars, magnitude, direction, types of vectors.",
      "competencies": [
        "Distinguish between vectors and scalars",
        "Calculate magnitude and direction cosines/ratios of a vector"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-IV: Vectors and Three-dimensional Geometry",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C14",
      "title": "Vector Operations",
      "description": "Understanding addition, scalar multiplication, position vectors.",
      "competencies": [
        "Perform vector addition and scalar multiplication"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-IV: Vectors and Three-dimensional Geometry",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C15",
      "title": "Dot and Cross Products",
      "description": "Understanding scalar (dot) product and vector (cross) product properties.",
      "competencies": [
        "Calculate the dot product of two vectors"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-IV: Vectors and Three-dimensional Geometry",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C16",
      "title": "Three-Dimensional Geometry - Lines",
      "description": "Understanding direction ratios, equations of lines (Cartesian/Vector), skew lines.",
      "competencies": [
        "Find direction cosines and ratios for a line joining two points"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-IV: Vectors and Three-dimensional Geometry",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C17",
      "title": "Distance Between Lines",
      "description": "Understanding shortest distance between skew lines.",
      "competencies": [
        "Calculate the shortest distance between two skew lines"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-IV: Vectors and Three-dimensional Geometry",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C18",
      "title": "Angle Between Lines",
      "description": "Understanding the angle between two lines.",
      "competencies": [
        "Calculate the angle between two given lines"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-IV: Vectors and Three-dimensional Geometry",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C19",
      "title": "Linear Programming Concepts",
      "description": "Understanding constraints, objective function, optimization.",
      "competencies": [
        "Identify feasible and infeasible regions"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-V: Linear Programming Problem",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C20",
      "title": "Graphical Solution of LPP",
      "description": "Understanding graphical method for solving linear programming problems.",
      "competencies": [
        "Solve simple linear programming problems in two variables using the graphical method"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-V: Linear Programming Problem",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C21",
      "title": "Probability Concepts",
      "description": "Understanding conditional probability, independent events.",
      "competencies": [
        "Calculate probabilities of independent and dependent events"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-VI: Probability",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C22",
      "title": "Theorems in Probability",
      "description": "Understanding multiplication theorem, total probability, Bayes' theorem.",
      "competencies": [
        "Apply the multiplication theorem on probability"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-VI: Probability",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C23",
      "title": "Bayes' Theorem and Total Probability",
      "description": "Understanding total probability and Bayes' theorem applications.",
      "competencies": [
        "Apply the law of total probability"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-VI: Probability",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C24",
      "title": "Bayes' Theorem Application",
      "description": "Understanding and applying Bayes' theorem.",
      "competencies": [
        "Apply Bayes' theorem to solve probability problems"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-VI: Probability",
      "chapter_name": ""
    }
  ]
}
